hero.headline: 1V1.
hero.body: Built by players, for players. The first 1v1 basketball tournament Morocco has ever held — and the first anywhere on the African continent.

about.paragraph1: Moroccan Court Kings is the first ever 1v1 basketball tournament in Morocco. And the first on the African continent. No precedent. No playbook. Just the court.
about.paragraph2: Born from the streets of Marrakech in 2022. Built by players, for players. No leagues, no gatekeepers, no copy of someone else’s blueprint — a new format, a new chapter, written one bracket at a time.

tournament.subhead: Built from the streets up: simple to enter, brutal to win, designed to make the best player rise.
tournament.f1Body: Pure individual skill. One court, two players, one winner. No teammates to hide behind.
tournament.f2Body: Open bracket, single-elimination. Win on the court, advance to the next round. No politics, just hoops.
tournament.f3Body: Real-time updates from courtside. Highlights captured by our in-house creators the moment they happen.
tournament.f4Body: Sponsor merch packs for the champion, gear for the finalists, recognition for the standout performers.
tournament.f5Body: Creatives, sports managers, photographers, filmmakers. The full package, all in.
tournament.f6Body: The first ever 1v1 basketball tournament in Africa. Marrakech tonight, the world next.

story.q1: It started in Marrakech, 2022. Just players, a court, and the obsession that turns into the seed of a movement.
story.q2: At first, only Marrakech. Not Morocco. Because Marrakech carried the energy, the visibility, and the identity. From there, it grew.
story.q3: The first ever 1v1 tournament on the African continent. New rules. New format. Built by players, for players. No prize pool to chase, the court is the only reward.
story.q4: No tickets sold. No salaries paid. No agendas served. Just the game, the players, the court, and the people who keep it alive. That is the whole story. That is the whole point.

champions.subhead: One bracket. One winner. Every year, a new name etched into the court’s memory.

sponsors.headline: Backed by the real ones.
sponsors.subhead: The brands who have stood with us since day one, and the ones we’re building with next.
sponsors.rchimDescription: Marrakech-rooted streetwear, on every court we touch.
sponsors.drywichDescription: Fueling the bracket, plate by plate, since day one.
sponsors.wearDescription: Hoop-first apparel, built for players who live the game.
sponsors.ctaHeadline: Brands who care about culture, not ad slots.

register.intro: MCK runs on Instagram. No sign-up forms, no waitlists, no email spam. The bracket lives where the culture lives.
register.b1Body: Brackets, dates, and venues drop on our Instagram before anywhere else.
register.b2Body: When the next bracket opens, send the word READY. That’s the entry list.
register.b3Body: Bracket day, on the court. No form, no fee, no waitlist limbo — just hoop.
register.step1Body: Tap follow on @moroccancourtkings. Every bracket announcement starts there.
register.step2Body: When registration drops, slide into the DMs with one word. You’re in the queue.
register.step3Body: We’ll send the date, the court, and the bracket. Show up. Hoop. Win.

contact.subhead: Three lines, three vibes. Hit whichever fits.
contact.c1Body: The court, the players, the culture. Every drop happens here first.
contact.c2Body: Brand partnerships, sponsorship decks, serious inquiries — find us on LinkedIn.
contact.c3Body: Marrakech is just stop one. If you can put a court, a crowd, and a camera on the ground — pitch it.

footer.description: The first ever 1v1 basketball tournament in Morocco, and the first on the African continent. Born in Marrakech, 2022.
footer.copyright: © {year} Moroccan Court Kings. All rights reserved.
